_readme: Reference only — not loaded by the browser. Copy manifest_template.json to manifest.json.

permissions.identity: Google OAuth sign-in (Gmail read-only) via chrome.identity.
permissions.activeTab: Interact with the tab you are filling when you click Check Emails.
permissions.scripting: Inject the content script on the form tab if it is not already loaded.
permissions.tabs: Resolve which tab to fill when the popup opens.
permissions.notifications: Optional alerts when no verification email or code is found.

host_permissions.*://*/*: Run content script on sites where you enter verification codes.

oauth2.scopes: gmail.readonly — read messages only; cannot send or delete mail.

browser_support.edge: 88+ — same package; use Edge extension ID for a second OAuth client if needed.
